meaning: v.进行预防接种n.被接种牛痘者
examples: Boser has to vaccinate her foxes against various diseases.
This inspired his team to vaccinate their kids.
They vaccinate our children and help us to recover when we are sick.
At that rate, it would take two years to vaccinate all those at risk.
The National Public Health Service for Wales (NPHSW) is urging parents to vaccinate their children.
